description: Japan's largest yakuza organization, founded in 1915 by Harukichi Yamaguchi in Kobe. It engages in extortion, gambling, prostitution, arms and drug trafficking, real estate kickbacks, and other criminal activities. Membership has declined sharply from its 1960s peak to 3,100 active members by 2025. The group operates across Japan and overseas, with headquarters in Kobe.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Primarily based in Kobe but has territory all over Japan , including in Nagoya , Tokyo and Hawaii , United States
country_links.context: The Yamaguchi-gumi has territory in Hawaii, United States.
